selected_projects.label: Wind Airfoil Campaigns
selected_projects.description: Automated CFD campaigns for wind-turbine airfoils, including meshing, RANS setup, transition studies, validation plots, and reporting.

selected_projects.label: OpenFOAM Transition Models
selected_projects.description: OpenFOAM turbulence and transition-model development with C++ changes, validation cases, and CI-backed review.

selected_projects.label: Wind Farm Solver Tooling
selected_projects.description: Simulation tooling for wind-farm CFD workflows, atmospheric boundary-layer setup, cloud execution, and repeatable post-processing.

selected_projects.label: Thermal Storage Solver
selected_projects.description: Thermal CFD workflow for high-temperature storage tanks, heat-transfer analysis, solidification effects, and engineering reports.

selected_projects.label: Multiphase Reactor Model
selected_projects.description: ANSYS Fluent multiphase CFD model for reactor flows, validation against experimental data, and design-oriented reporting.

selected_projects.label: Reduced-Order Heat Transfer Tool
selected_projects.description: Reduced-order modeling tool for fluid-thermal simulations, parametric sweeps, and fast design-space exploration.

selected_projects.label: Compressor Stage Validation
selected_projects.description: CFD validation workflow for compressor-stage performance, outlet distortion, pressure ratio, and temperature-rise analysis.

selected_projects.label: Mesh Quality Checker
selected_projects.description: Python utility for checking CFD mesh metrics, flagging bad cells, and producing setup-review reports.

bullets.text: Validated airfoil CFD results against wind-tunnel data and literature references.
Analyzed boundary-layer transition, separation, and stall behavior in airfoil simulations.
Generated airfoil polar databases for downstream engineering models.
Automated airfoil case setup, execution, post-processing, and report generation.
Integrated OpenFOAM workflows into a commercial wind-engineering platform.
Developed atmospheric-boundary-layer wall-function workflows for wind CFD.
Implemented cloud-based simulation runs with repeatable setup and recovery scripts.
Improved post-processing repeatability for wind-resource simulation outputs.
Taught OpenFOAM case setup, boundary conditions, and solver workflow basics.
Taught CFD validation practices, setup discipline, and interpretation of results.
Created CFD lab exercises with datasets, meshes, and solution guidance.
Taught ANSYS Fluent workflows for thermal and flow-analysis problems.
Modeled high-temperature thermal-storage systems using CFD and heat-transfer analysis.
Created heat-transfer design reports and engineering recommendations.
Studied solidification effects in thermal-fluid storage concepts.
Ran thermal parametric studies and summarized trends for design review.
Built multiphase CFD reactor models for process-engineering applications.
Validated simulation results against experimental measurements.
Translated CFD results into design guidance for engineering teams.
Prepared multiphase modeling reports with assumptions, limitations, and recommendations.
Developed reduced-order fluid-thermal models for fast simulation studies.
Ran parametric HPC simulation studies to build model databases.
Used optimization workflows for design-space exploration.
Validated reduced-order models against CFD results.

core_skills.CFD: RANS, external aerodynamics, thermal CFD, multiphase CFD, validation, post-processing
core_skills.OpenFOAM: OpenFOAM setup, solver workflows, C++ customization, validation cases
core_skills.Turbulence Modeling: SST, k-omega, k-epsilon, transition modeling, wall functions, separation and stall
core_skills.Wind Energy: Airfoils, wind-resource workflows, ABL modeling, wind-farm simulations
core_skills.Meshing: Mesh quality checks, structured setup review, case preparation, Fluent/OpenFOAM meshes
core_skills.Validation: Wind-tunnel comparison, experimental correlation, sensitivity studies, error diagnosis
core_skills.Python Automation: Python/Bash pre-processing, batch execution, post-processing, plots, reports
core_skills.HPC: Linux clusters, parametric runs, job logs, restart workflows, large simulation campaigns
core_skills.ANSYS Fluent: Thermal CFD, multiphase setup, UDF-style workflows, result interpretation
core_skills.Heat Transfer: Conduction, convection, storage tanks, thermal design studies, temperature fields
core_skills.Multiphase Flow: VOF/Eulerian-style concepts, reactor modeling, phase interaction, validation
core_skills.Solidification: Phase change, thermal storage, solidification fronts, material-property effects
core_skills.Reduced-Order Modeling: POD, surrogate models, parametric databases, fast design studies
core_skills.Python Postprocessing: pandas, NumPy, plotting, table generation, report-ready artifacts
core_skills.Engineering Reporting: Assumptions, setup choices, validation summaries, engineering recommendations
